requiredEnv.name: DASHSCOPE_API_KEY
requiredEnv.purpose: Authenticate DashScope calls for Qwen Omni translation and plugin-local Wan generation.

optionalEnv.name: DASHSCOPE_BASE_URL
optionalEnv.purpose: Override the DashScope OpenAI-compatible API base URL.

optionalEnv.name: QWEN_OMNI_MODEL
optionalEnv.purpose: Override the default Qwen Omni model used for video translation.

userProvidedUrls: public video URLs passed to video_to_ui_brief.py
public first-frame, last-frame, or driving-audio URLs passed to plugin-local Wan i2v flows
notes: The repo scripts do not install packages or fetch code.
run_visual_loop.py invokes plugin-local Wan wrappers instead of home-directory skill scripts.

subprocesses.purpose: Run plugin-local Wan wrappers for image and video generation.
